description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a muscular build, lying on its back with all four legs in the air. Its coat is short and smooth, predominantly dark brown with large white patches on the chest, neck, and parts of the legs. The head is broad and rounded, with a short snout and a pronounced stop, typical of certain bulldog breeds. The ears are small, set high, and appear to be semi-erect or slightly flopped to the sides. The tail is short and appears relaxed, lying close to the body. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog has a relaxed, comfortable posture.
description: A muscular, short-haired dog with a dark brown and white coat, lying on its back with legs up. The dog has a broad head, semi-erect ears, and a short tail.
description_view_0: Side view of the dog lying on its back, showing the full length of the body and the relaxed position of the legs and head.
description_view_1: Front view from above the head, highlighting the broad face, short snout, and the white patch on the chest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the white markings on the chest and neck, and the relaxed position of the legs.
description_view_3: View from the rear, focusing on the hind legs, short tail, and the white patch running down the center of the body.
